company.name: VanGATE
company.taglineFull: Superior Door & Gate Systems • Engineered Precision • Full In-House CNC Fabrication
company.description: Focused on creating commercial and residential automatic entrance solutions, VanGATE Manufacturing and Automation provides comprehensive design, manufacturing, and installation services that are tailored to suit the needs of each individual customer.

hero.title: Fully Integrated Gate & Door Manufacturer
hero.subtitle: From Engineering to Installation — Everything Built In-House. At VanGATE, we deliver fully integrated in-house engineering, fabrication, and automation capabilities. Serving Residential, Commercial, and Industrial clients across British Columbia.

header.title: Solutions For Every Need
header.subtitle: Whether you're a homeowner or a facility manager, we have the right solution for you

items.title: Residential
items.description: Focused on creating residential automatic entrance solutions. Enhance your home's security and curb appeal with premium overhead garage doors, door-in-door garage doors, residential gates, spiral roll-up doors, and professional automation services.

items.title: Commercial & Industrial
items.description: High-performance commercial and industrial door systems designed for reliability, security, and maximum efficiency. From sectional doors to high-speed doors, rolling steel doors, parking gates, barrier systems, and dock equipment.

items.title: Lift & Rotate
items.description: Advanced vertical transportation solutions for residential and commercial applications. From home elevators and compact lifts to hydraulic lift platforms, vehicle lift platforms, and turntables — engineered for safety and reliability.

items.title: Advanced CNC Manufacturing
items.description: State-of-the-art precision manufacturing with full in-house CNC capabilities. From laser cutting and waterjet cutting to CNC bending, routing, laser welding, and custom fabrication — delivering engineering precision for every project.

header.title: Why Choose Us
header.description: VanGATE is Western Canada's fully integrated gate and door manufacturer. From initial engineering to final installation, every step is handled by our team — ensuring quality, accountability, and seamless project delivery.

items.title: Vertical Integration
items.description: Engineering, fabrication, and installation — all under one roof

items.title: Custom Solutions
items.description: Tailored designs to meet your specific requirements

items.title: Certified Quality
items.description: Industry certifications and safety standards met

items.title: Service & Support
items.description: 24/7 emergency repairs, maintenance, and ongoing support

items.title: Metro Vancouver Warehouse
items.description: High-speed industrial doors and automated loading dock systems for a 50,000 sq ft distribution center.

items.title: Richmond Manufacturing Plant
items.description: Custom security gates and access control systems with integrated surveillance for a food processing facility.

items.title: West Vancouver Estate
items.description: Custom automated driveway gate with intercom system and smartphone control integration.

header.title: Trusted by Clients
header.subtitle: For over 20 years, VanGATE has been providing engineered gate and access solutions throughout the Greater Vancouver area.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subtitle: Get a free consultation and quote. Our team is ready to help you find the perfect solution.

footer.about: Western Canada's fully integrated gate and door manufacturer. From Engineering to Installation — Everything Built In-House.
